AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VASQUEZ, JOSE MANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, DAVID B RODRIGUEZ, RUBIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JOSE MANUEL VASQUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAVID B. RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. RUBEN RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, JOSE MANUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, DAVID B RODRIGUEZ, RUBIN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,620.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
